column_values.text:
ASSISTANT TO ERIN YABROUDY - HIGH PRIORITY/VISIBILITY
EMMA MIXON IS POINT OF CONTACT

ADMIN:
- Assign Cheyenne & Kalin ONLY
- When Emma books, they'll usually want a Luxury Package & 2D floor plan
- Always gets 2D Floorplan, add to order if not already there
- Reels need to be uploaded as unbranded- they like it to show on the website 
- Scheduling is typically a bit hectic with them, anticipate reschedules, but make sure we do not double book creatives for this client 
- If we have to change the booking, they will freak out
- Try to put Cheyenne on an appointment with them at least 1 in 3 bookings to check in with them
 
CREATIVES:
- Client loves to do an agent feature reel with intro, outro, and sometimes a middle part. 
- Almost always needs help with scripting, or tweaking their script to make it stronger. 
- For photos throw in a few vertical shots for social media. 
- Typically Erin & Emma will meet you on-site, and then do the agent feature first so Erin can leave. 

EDITORS:
- For video editing, minimize speed ramps and prioritize good color grading.
- For captions, please make sure they are TASTEFUL like in the samples.
Reference Projects:
- Luxury Package 1: https://infinite-views-ga.aryeo.com/sites/xavbowb/unbranded
- Luxury Package 2: https://infinite-views-ga.aryeo.com/sites/zelemrv/unbranded

column_values.text:
ASSISTANT TO ERIN YABROUDY - HIGH PRIORITY/VISIBILITY
EMMA MIXON IS POINT OF CONTACT

ADMIN:
- Assign Cheyenne & Kalin ONLY
- When Emma says "photos", she usually means a package
- Always gets 2D Floorplan, add to order if not already there
- Reels need to be uploaded as unbranded- they like it to show on the website 
- Scheduling is typically a bit hectic with them, anticipate reschedules, but make sure we do not double book creatives for this client 
- If we have to change the booking, they will freak out
- Try to put Cheyenne on an appointment with them at least 1 in 3 bookings to check in with them
 
CREATIVES:
- Client loves to do an agent feature reel with intro, outro, and sometimes a middle part. 
- Almost always needs help with scripting, or tweaking their script to make it stronger. 
- For photos throw in a few vertical shots for social media. 
- Typically Erin & Emma will meet you on-site, and then do the agent feature first so Erin can leave. 

EDITORS:
- For video editing, minimize speed ramps and prioritize good color grading.
- For captions, please make sure they are TASTEFUL like in the samples.
